description_long: This is a classic cylindrical metal trash bin with a domed, ribbed lid and a dark, weathered finish. The surface shows signs of rust, grime, and wear, especially near the bottom and on the lid, indicating prolonged outdoor use. The lid features a prominent top-mounted handle for easy lifting, and there are sturdy, external side handles attached to the upper rim for carrying. The body of the bin is vertically ribbed, providing structural strength and a traditional appearance. The bin appears to be made primarily of galvanized steel, with some areas showing discoloration from exposure to the elements. There are no visible wheels or labeling, and the bin is unmarked.
description: A weathered, cylindrical metal trash bin with a domed, ribbed lid, top and side handles, and visible rust and grime.
description_view_0: Front view showing the domed lid with a top handle and a prominent side handle centered on the bin.
description_view_1: Rotated view highlighting the opposite side handle and more extensive rust patches on the lid and body.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side shows the other main handle and less pronounced rust near the base.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the top handle and the largest rust patch on the lid, with both side handles partially visible.
